summary: Phase 3 testing complete: Agent Deployment, Knowledge Base CRUD, Follow-up Rules CRUD, Agent Personality Config (tone, emoji_level, verbosity_level, escalation_rules), WhatsApp webhook escalation. 15/15 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified in AgentConfig page with 4 tabs.
seed_data_creation: Test knowledge items and follow-up rules created and cleaned up during tests. Existing agent: Carol Vendas (003330f0-4eaf-452c-9aea-aaf28a0f5c94)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 agent features working. User has 1 deployed agent (Carol Vendas). Free plan limits tested (1 agent max, deploy returns 403). Knowledge base has 3 items (Horario FAQ, Plano Starter PRODUCT, Politica de Reembolso POLICY). AgentConfig page has 4 tabs: Personality, Knowledge, Follow-up, Advanced. Webhook escalation detection works on keywords like 'atendente', 'humano', 'gerente', 'reclamação'.

backend_apis: GET /api/agents/marketplace - returns 22 marketplace agents with name, type, category, rating
GET /api/agents - returns deployed agents with tone, emoji_level, verbosity_level, escalation_rules, follow_up_config
GET /api/agents/{id} - returns single agent with all config fields
PUT /api/agents/{id} - updates tone, emoji_level, verbosity_level, escalation_rules (verified with GET)
POST /api/agents/deploy - blocked by free plan limit (403), validates template exists (404)
POST /api/agents/{id}/knowledge - creates knowledge item (faq, product, policy, hours, custom)
GET /api/agents/{id}/knowledge - lists knowledge items with type, title, content
POST /api/webhook/whatsapp - processes messages, escalation keyword detection works
frontend_pages: Agents page (/agents) - loads with dark luxury theme in Portuguese
Agents - Marketplace/My Agents toggle visible (22 marketplace, 1 deployed)
Agents - Marketplace shows agent cards with name, type, rating, 'Publicar Agente' button
Agents - Type filters: Todos, Vendas, Suporte, Agenda, SAC, Onboarding
Agents - Search input works
Agents - My Agents tab shows deployed agents with 'Configurar' button
AgentConfig page (/agents/{id}/config) - loads with agent name 'Carol Vendas'
AgentConfig - Header: agent name (editable), type, tone, Save button
AgentConfig - 4 tabs: Personalidade, Conhecimento, Pos-atendimento, Avancado
AgentConfig - Personality tab: 5 tone options (Profissional, Amigavel, Empatico, Direto, Consultivo)
AgentConfig - Personality tab: Emoji slider (0-100%), Verbosity slider (0-100%)
AgentConfig - Personality tab: Preview shows sample message with selected tone/emoji
AgentConfig - Knowledge tab: Shows existing items (FAQ Horario, PRODUCT Plano Starter, POLICY Politica)
AgentConfig - Knowledge tab: Add button opens form with type dropdown, title, content
AgentConfig - Knowledge tab: Delete buttons on each item
AgentConfig - Knowledge tab: 'Instrucoes adicionais' textarea
AgentConfig - Follow-up tab: Toggle for 'Pos-Atendimento Automatico'
AgentConfig - Follow-up tab: Max follow-ups and Cooldown config inputs
AgentConfig - Follow-up tab: Add rule button and rules list
AgentConfig - Advanced tab: System prompt textarea (editable)
AgentConfig - Advanced tab: Escalation keywords input (comma-separated)
AgentConfig - Advanced tab: 'Testar Agente no Sandbox' button

mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp webhook auto-reply pipeline built but no real Evolution API integration. Escalation detection works on keywords.

ai_integration_notes.model: Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key
